0.name: Daniil Sudorgin
0.description: Front-end developer. Developer with commercial experience in Svelte, who used this course to deeply master the modern React ecosystem. He focuses on building robust, scalable applications with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, full test coverage, and pragmatic engineering solutions.

1.name: Denys Yeresko
1.description: Front-end developer. Working with React and TypeScript, I demonstrate integration with REST API, creation of interfaces using a clear component architecture. I'm quickly delving into the project, writing intelligent code and learning all about web.

2.name: Vitali Navahran
2.description: Team Lead. Vitali, 29, is a passionate developer who started programming in 2013 with Java, building Android apps. He later transitioned to Kotlin, embracing modern mobile development. In 2020, he improved his English to a pre-intermediate level, expanding his opportunities. Recently, he explored front-end development through RS School, learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and enjoys blending creativity with problem-solving. Outside coding, he loves PC gaming, fixing electronics, car repairs, and swimming. He aims to grow as a developer, tackle bigger projects, and possibly teach in the future.
